name: Sourdough Starter#1 (Jvb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix equal parts flour and water in a non-metallic container until well combined.
2. Cover the mixture loosely and let it stand at room temperature for 24 hours.
3. Feed with equal parts white flour and water after every use, stirring thoroughly.
4. Keep refrigerated and use weekly, or store in the freezer when not in use.
5. Bring to room temperature before each use.
